sessions.intent: Design Setup.goal execution system for runtime2

before.assumptions: runtime2 has Goal.IsSetup flag and EngineGoals.Setup filter but no automatic setup execution, no run-once tracking, no Executions persistence
before.risk: Low — design only, no code changes

sessions.plan: Design the Setup.goal system: Setup object on EngineGoals with Executions smart collection, context.Setup propagation through goal.call, one-row-per-step persistence in system.sqlite, Steps.RunAsync ownership of iteration with run-once check

actions.context: Traced runtime1 RunSetup, HasExecuted, setup goal detection, and settings persistence to understand existing behavior
Analyzed runtime2 current state: Step.Hash already exists, Steps lacks RunAsync, Goal iterates steps directly (OBP violation), EngineGoals.Setup is IEnumerable not an object
Wrote handoff spec for coder — Setup object model, Executions collection, context propagation, persistence, file-level change list

after.health: Design approved through iterative discussion. Key insights: Setup is an object not a filter, Executions is a smart collection not a dictionary, context.Setup propagates through goal.call, Steps needs RunAsync for OBP compliance
after.notes: Step.Hash already exists on the model. Builder may need hash composition change (goalPath + compiledAction, no index). Error tolerance policy deferred to future work.
